title: Lomatolepis nudicaulis

The roots of Lomatolepis nudicaulis have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, anti-inflammatory effects, and as a respiratory aid. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties.
